extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked on the final ascent to Chiroubles with 400m remaining, soloing to victory 14 seconds ahead of SCHACHMANN Maximilian.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked inside final 400m when rivals hesitated after VLASOV counterattack, exploiting coordination failure among chasers.
BERNARD Julian attacked breakaway on first Mont Brouilly ascent, forcing NAESEN Oliver to chase while King of Mountains DOUBEY Fabien cracked spectacularly.
BENNETT George set tempo over Mont Brouilly for Jumbo-Visma, keeping race controlled before ROGLIČ's late acceleration.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: launched devastating late attack when rivals looked at each other, cruise control form identical to Vuelta peak
rider_signals.DOUBEY Fabien: negative: came to standstill on first Mont Brouilly ascent wearing KOM jersey, accumulated fatigue from early-race work visible
rider_signals.BERNARD Julian: positive: attacked breakaway companions on first Mont Brouilly climb with Trek-Segafredo continuing early-season momentum
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: chased hard but limited losses to 14 seconds, defending champion showing form but not Roglič's explosive power
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: neutral: launched counterattack that temporarily disrupted chase group coordination before Roglič's winning move
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: immediate reaction to VLASOV counterattack, finished in chase group limiting losses on summit finish
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: climbed with elite company hunting bonus seconds, unusual strength on categorized climbs for sprint-oriented rider
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: took young rider lead after Ventoux form carried into Paris-Nice, rode with main group on decisive climb
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: retained young rider jersey with 4-second advantage over VLASOV after trying to follow late attacks
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: explicitly described as not having good climb on Mont Brouilly, lost contact with leaders
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: led peloton over Mont Brouilly for Jumbo-Visma, controlling pace before teammate's decisive move
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: neutral: followed BERNARD's breakaway attack closely, second wheel positioning on Mont Brouilly
